case_title: ALEKSEY ROZHNEV et al VS. LARRY HOPKINS HONDA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POZNYAKOV, ALEXANDR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARRY HOPKINS HONDA $601.88 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $601.88, ***AMENDED AND CORRECTED JUDGMENT*** PLAINTIFF ALEKSEY ROZHNEV DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES FOR THE COST OF REPAIR OF THE DOOR OF THE VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
